---
name: Feature / Module Suggestion
about: Suggest an idea, new module topic, or exercise for this repository
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem or learning gap is. E.g. "There's no coverage of Serverless Security or OWASP API Top 10."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what content or feature you want added.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative approaches or frameworks considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, references, or links to security standards (e.g. NIST, OWASP, MITRE ATT&CK) here.
